productDisplayName: Puma Men Athletic White Polo Tshirt
description: Composition White T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed spread collar with a three button chest placket, short sleeves and distressed graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Wash and iron inside-out Gentle machine wash in cool water with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron With a sporty touch, this Athletic Polo T-shirt from puma makes for a perfect casual wear. Crafted from soft cotton, this T-shirt is sure to offer exemplary comfort, while the distressed print adds an athletic feel and is sure to elevate it into a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
